connectorUiConfig.title: NetworkLogAPI
connectorUiConfig.descriptionMarkdown:
The NetworkLogAPI connector ingests network log data from the NetworkLogAPI platform into Microsoft Sentinel.

Supports API Key authentication.

For more information, visit [NetworkLogAPI Docs](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/robertmoriarty12/Sentinel-CCF-Pull-Connector-Builder-Agent-Accelerator/main/NetworkLogAPI_API_Documentation.md).

graphQueries.baseQuery: {{graphQueriesTableName}} | where TimeGenerated > ago(14d) | summarize count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 1d)

resourceProvider.permissionsDisplayText: read and write permissions are required.

customs.name: NetworkLogAPI API Key
customs.description: A NetworkLogAPI API Key is required. [See documentation](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/robertmoriarty12/Sentinel-CCF-Pull-Connector-Builder-Agent-Accelerator/main/NetworkLogAPI_API_Documentation.md)

sampleQueries.description: All network log events from the last 24 hours
Denied or dropped traffic by source IP
sampleQueries.query: {{graphQueriesTableName}} | where Action in ('DENY', 'DROP') | summarize count() by SourceIp | order by count_ desc

{{graphQueriesTableName}} | where Severity in ('High', 'Critical') | project TimeGenerated, SourceIp, DestinationIp, Protocol, Action, Severity, ThreatIndicator, Category | order by TimeGenerated desc
{{graphQueriesTableName}} | where isnotempty(ThreatIndicator) | summarize count() by ThreatIndicator, Category | order by count_ desc

sampleQueries.description: Traffic volume by protocol and network zone
sampleQueries.query: {{graphQueriesTableName}} | summarize TotalBytesIn = sum(BytesIn), TotalBytesOut = sum(BytesOut), EventCount = count() by Protocol, NetworkZone | order by EventCount desc

instructionSteps.title: Step 1 - Obtain your NetworkLogAPI credentials
instructionSteps.description: Log in to the NetworkLogAPI portal and navigate to **Settings > API Keys** to generate an API key. Note your API Base URL from the portal or vendor documentation.

instructionSteps.title: Step 2 - Connect NetworkLogAPI to Microsoft Sentinel
instructionSteps.description: Provide your NetworkLogAPI Base URL and API Key below to establish the connection.
